segments.text: I'm alive, man. It looks like Mr. E awakened an ultra instinct, man. He hasn't really been getting hit, bro.
Yeah. Oh, I mean, you know, commentators curse, but...
Yeah, absolutely. Hey, that's our power, guys. Like, you know, we're not top players, but we can curse some people in the stream for sure.

full_text: I'm alive, man. It looks like Mr. E awakened an ultra instinct, man. He hasn't really been getting hit, bro. Yeah. Oh, I mean, you know, commentators curse, but... Yeah, absolutely. Hey, that's our power, guys. Like, you know, we're not top players, but we can curse some people in the stream for sure. Yeah, definitely.
